data.title: Investment law firm Halper Sadeh LLC urges DHIL, SNCR, FRGE, HOLX shareholders to discuss rights; time-sensitive. NY, Dec 11, 2025.
data.description: Investors are urged to promptly reach out to the company as time may be running out to assert their rights. A legal firm, Halper Sadeh LLC, based in New York, disclosed on December 11, 2025, that they are probing multiple companies for potential breaches of federal securities laws.

data.title: LibertyStream closes first tranche of LIFE offering, issuing 13,707,691 units at $0.65 each for $8,909,999.15.
data.description: Dallas-based LibertyStream Infrastructure Partners Inc. (TSXV: LIB | OTCQB: VLTLF | FSE: I2D) has successfully concluded the initial phase of its private placement of units, announcing the closure of the first tranche. A total of 13,707,691 Units were issued at $0.65 each, resulting in a substantial aggregate gross proceeds of $8,909,999.15. The company is now gearing up to finalize the remaining portion of the placement in the near future. This move signifies a positive growth trajectory for LibertyStream in the critical minerals sector.

data.title: Bitcoin miners Marathon Digital Holdings, Riot Platforms, and Hut 8 could drive corp adoption as they rank among top ten firms holding Bitcoin.
data.description: Marathon Digital Holdings, Riot Blockchain, and Hut 8 have secured spots amongst the top ten largest public companies holding Bitcoin. These influential Bitcoin miners have successfully built their position in the cryptocurrency market, emphasizing their importance within the industry.
A spokesperson for the Australian government stated they support Australian families over online platforms in the Reddit legal matter.

data.title: FCPT buys Jiffy Lube property for $2.7M in Colorado, part of their focus on net-leased properties.
data.description: Four Corners Property Trust (NYSE:FCPT), a real estate investment trust focused on high-quality, net-leased restaurant and retail properties, has acquired a newly constructed Jiffy Lube property for $2.7 million in Colorado. The property is situated in a prominent retail area and is subject to a long-term, triple net lease. This lease is guaranteed by the corporate entity.

data.title: Chapman University predicts 2.0% GDP growth in 2026 fueled by AI investments and $55 trillion household wealth surge.
data.description: Chapman University has released its 2026 U.S. Economic Forecast, predicting a 2.0% real GDP growth for the year, an increase from 1.8% in 2025. This growth is attributed to investments in AI infrastructure and a $55 trillion surge in household wealth since 2020. The forecast highlights the importance of technology investment in creating new jobs and industries, while rising household wealth has supported consumer spending. However, tariffs could lead to increased costs for certain imported goods. The forecast, presented by President Emeritus Jim Doti, offers insights for business and policy leaders navigating the uncertain economic landscape.

data.title: Airwallex buys majority stake in Indonesian payments company PT Skye Sab; boosts global financial infrastructure for local merchants.
data.description: Airwallex, a prominent figure in business banking innovation, has obtained the majority stake in PT Skye Sab Indonesia, a licensee holding a PJP (Penyedia Jasa Pembayaran) Category 1. With this acquisition, Indonesian merchants aiming to broaden their reach globally can leverage Airwallex's expansive financial framework. This move offers them opportunities for expansion and improved finance management for global growth, along with facilitating international business transactions.

data.title: Orlando Health Sciences University renamed to honor Drs. Kiran and Pallavi Patel, solidifying its status as a top institution. Dec. 11, 2025. #PRNewswire
data.description: In Orlando, Florida on December 11, 2025, the Board of Directors of the institution formerly identified as Orlando Health Sciences University, which is the overseeing entity of the Orlando College of Osteopathic Medicine (OCOM), the most recent medical school in Florida, made a significant announcement.
